user.getById: SELECT id, "user", email, phone, bio, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE id = $1 LIMIT 1;
user.getByEmail: SELECT id, "user", email, phone, bio, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE email = $1 LIMIT 1;
user.getByUser: SELECT id, "user", email, phone, bio, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE "user" = $1 LIMIT 1;
user.getByPhone: SELECT id, "user", email, phone, bio, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE phone = $1 LIMIT 1;
user.updateProfile: UPDATE users SET phone = $2, bio = $3 WHERE id = $1 RETURNING id, "user", email, phone, bio, created_at, updated_at;
user.list: SELECT id, "user", email, phone, bio, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE ($1 = '' OR "user" ILIKE $2 OR email ILIKE $2 OR phone ILIKE $2) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT $3 OFFSET $4;
user.count: SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total FROM users WHERE ($1 = '' OR "user" ILIKE $2 OR email ILIKE $2 OR phone ILIKE $2);
user.search: SELECT id, "user", email FROM users WHERE ($1 = '' OR "user" ILIKE $1 OR email ILIKE $1) ORDER BY "user" ASC LIMIT $2;
user.getByIds: SELECT id, "user", email FROM users WHERE id = ANY($1::uuid[]) ORDER BY "user" ASC;
